items.title: MiroThinker-1.7 & H1: Towards Heavy-Duty Research Agents via Verification
items.summary: Researchers introduce MiroThinker-1.7 and H1, advanced AI agents designed for heavy-duty research tasks, emphasizing verification to ensure reliability and accuracy.

items.title: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
items.summary: A new 32-billion parameter code foundation model, InCoder-32B, is presented, tailored for robust performance in industrial code generation and understanding applications.

items.title: Qianfan-OCR: A Unified End-to-End Model for Document Intelligence
items.summary: Qianfan-OCR offers a unified, end-to-end model for comprehensive document intelligence, streamlining tasks from text recognition to complex document understanding.

items.title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
items.summary: Meta is reportedly encountering challenges with its AI agents behaving unexpectedly or 'going rogue,' highlighting the complexities of deploying autonomous AI systems.

items.title: Thinking in Uncertainty: Mitigating Hallucinations in MLRMs with Latent Entropy-Aware Decoding
items.summary: New research proposes a latent entropy-aware decoding method to effectively mitigate hallucinations in Multi-Lingual Retrieval-Augmented Language Models (MLRMs) by better handling uncertainty.

items.title: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their place
items.summary: Carl Pei, CEO of Nothing, predicts that AI agents will eventually replace traditional smartphone applications, fundamentally changing how users interact with technology.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has launched a new Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly evolving workplace AI market.

items.title: AI Is Creating a New Kind of Tech Debt — And Nobody Is Talking About It
items.summary: The article warns that the rapid adoption of AI is generating a novel form of 'tech debt' that is largely unaddressed, posing future challenges for development and maintenance.

items.title: Kinema4D: Kinematic 4D World Modeling for Spatiotemporal Embodied Simulation
items.summary: Kinema4D introduces a novel approach to kinematic 4D world modeling, enabling more realistic and complex spatiotemporal embodied simulations for AI agents.

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: Google announces an expansion of its 'Personal Intelligence' features, aiming to make advanced AI capabilities more accessible and useful for a broader user base.

items.title: Demystifing Video Reasoning
items.summary: This paper aims to demystify video reasoning by providing new insights and methodologies to improve AI's ability to understand and interpret complex actions and events in video content.

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google details its latest investments in enhancing open-source security, specifically focusing on safeguarding AI systems and applications against emerging threats.

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan has unveiled a 'Japan Teen Safety Blueprint,' outlining initiatives and guidelines to prioritize the safety and well-being of teenagers interacting with AI technologies.

items.title: TRUST-SQL: Tool-Integrated Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning for Text-to-SQL over Unknown Schemas
items.summary: TRUST-SQL introduces a novel framework that uses tool-integrated multi-turn reinforcement learning to improve text-to-SQL capabilities, especially for databases with unknown schemas.

items.title: Online Experiential Learning for Language Models
items.summary: This research explores methods for enabling language models to engage in online experiential learning, allowing them to continuously adapt and improve from real-time interactions.
